# llms.txt — Information for AI Agents
# Describes the openinnova.it site for AI crawlers (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, ...)

# Website: Open Innova
# URL: https://openinnova.it

> Consulenza Open Innovation e software su misura per imprese, terzo settore e PA italiane.

Open Innova affianca organizzazioni che vogliono integrare nei propri processi le competenze del proprio ecosistema. Combina consulenza strategica e sviluppo software, applicando il modello di Open Innovation di Henry Chesbrough (UC Berkeley).

## Company

**Name:** Open Innova S.r.l.
**Legal form:** S.r.l. (Società a responsabilità limitata)
**Founded:** 2026
**Headquarters:** Via Mario Donati Guerrieri 16, 06132 Perugia (PG), Italy
**VAT ID:** IT04035340548
**Languages:** Italian (primary), English

## What We Do

### 1. Strategic consulting
- Open Innovation transformation
- Ecosystem mapping and partnership design
- Process redesign and change management
- KPI definition and measurement

Typical engagements last 6-12 months. Pricing is project-based, defined after a free initial assessment.

### 2. Executive coaching
One-on-one coaching for founders, CEOs and leaders driving collaborative-innovation transformations. Confidential, biweekly cadence by default, durations from 3 to 12 months.

### 3. Training & workshops
Operational sessions on Open Innovation methods, partner ecosystem building, and innovation portfolio management. Formats from 1 to 2 days.

### 4. Custom software development
Tailored platforms co-created with the client's team, following the same collaborative model that produced Gestiscu.it. The client owns the source code.

## Products

### Gestiscu.it
Flagship product. Digital platform that transformed the management of the Italian Servizio Civile. Co-designed with administrative bodies, third-sector entities, and cooperatives. Universal across entity types, enterprise-grade security, full GDPR/audit compliance.

URL: https://gestiscu.it

### Custom software
Bespoke software for organizations whose needs are not met by generic SaaS — third-sector entities, public administrations, social cooperatives, scaleups with specific requirements.

## Core Concept: Open Innovation

Based on Henry Chesbrough's model (UC Berkeley, 2003):
- **Permeable organizational boundaries** — combine internal and external ideas systematically
- **Strategic IP and know-how flow** — share selectively, capture value bidirectionally
- **Ecosystem collaboration** — with startups, universities, customers, partners
- **Accelerated time-to-market** — through validated partnerships rather than internal silos

## Founders

- **Giovanni Rende** — Co-founder and Sole Director. Strategic vision, consulting experience with third-sector entities.
- **Daniele Nucciarelli** — Co-founder. Software architect / full-stack developer. Scalable backends, secure architectures, distributed systems.
- **Emanuele Persichini** — Co-founder. Full-stack developer. Django, applied cryptography, frontend/UX.

## Online presence

- **Website:** https://openinnova.it
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/ulivs-app

## Technology & privacy

- **Website stack:** static site generated with Hugo
- **No cookies** — the site does not set any cookie, including technical/tracking ones
- **No analytics** — no Google Analytics, Plausible, Matomo or equivalent
- **No third-party trackers** — strict Content Security Policy, no external scripts
- **Contact form** — pure mailto, no third-party form service
- **Source code:** open source where indicated; brand assets and content remain proprietary

## Values

Collaboration, openness, continuous innovation, sustainability.

---

For questions about Open Innova or this website, write to info@openinnova.it.
